nodes.label: AI as tool for salvage and enhancement of imperfect recordings
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of artifacts and inconsistencies
nodes.grounding_span: It feels great to be able to use a recording that was not ideal in the first place

nodes.label: AI as automation of tedious tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement of creative act
nodes.grounding_span: It has allowed me to focus more on the fun, rewarding parts of the job, as the more tedious and monotonous elements are becoming easier to automate

nodes.label: AI as generative threat to artistic authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: the generative AI that can create songs out of thin air worry me a lot

nodes.label: AI as information and planning resource
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or distracting source
nodes.grounding_span: It tends to be my first resource when I am looking for information on a piece of gear

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment through hands-on artistry
nodes.grounding_span: Making the art is the most important part

nodes.label: Professional competence and problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I can split the instruments and apply separate processing and levels to each piece of the band to make it sound passable

nodes.label: Economic viability of music profession
nodes.grounding_span: makes idea of trying to become a profitable artist even more difficult

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as salvage tool
nodes.grounding_span: It feels great to be able to use a recording that was not ideal in the first place

nodes.label: Concern about generative AI replacing artistry
nodes.grounding_span: the generative AI that can create songs out of thin air worry me a lot

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI industry's vision
nodes.grounding_span: It feels like the people creating this technology want the ai to do the work for you

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool evaluation based on utility and limitations
nodes.grounding_span: There can be artifacts, and inconsistencies but it has been improving consistently over time

nodes.label: Value-driven boundary setting between enhancement and replacement
nodes.grounding_span: as soon as the AI is making the song for you, it really defeats the purpose
